questions.question: What Mediterranean country's highest appeals court ruled it is not a crime to occasionally beat your wife, in 1997?

What was Spode the first to make in 1797, by adding bone ash to hard-paste porcelain?
What did 3Com boss Eric Benhamon say he wished he had named his company, after fan outrage?
What's Larry King's definitive fashion statement?
